attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a positioning and tempo asset in valleys and approaches to climbs, rarely initiating decisive moves himself.
team_tactics: Deployed as a pre-climb neutralization weapon, controlling tempo in valleys and descents to prevent breakaway advantages before key finale climbs.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling valley sections and descents before mountain finales where his time trial power can control pace. Vulnerable when prolonged steep climbing required.
vulnerability: Limited observations show mechanical issues (punctures) can disrupt race flow. Likely struggles when steep gradients require sustained climbing vs tempo riding.
key_patterns: Used as domestique to neutralize pace in valleys before final climbs (2 observations)
Tactical positioning role rather than personal GC ambitions in stage races (2 observations)
Mechanical incidents present risk factor requiring team support to recover position (1 observation)
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data. Last observation from 2021 shows continued team domestique role at WorldTour level.
